item.title: Version 0.15.0
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.15.0 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * fix: fix disappearing “Check for Updates” button issue by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/41 * feat: add true tone display plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/42 * feat: add night shift plugin by @ayangweb in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/43
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v0.14.0...v0.15.0
